title: Outlook crashes when opening email attachments
description: Outlook desktop client crashes immediately when attempting to open any email attachment. The application closes without an error message. Issue started after this morning's Windows update. Affects all attachment types including PDF and Word documents.

title: Teams calls keep dropping after 5 minutes
description: All Teams video calls disconnect exactly around the 5-minute mark. Audio-only calls are unaffected. Issue is reproducible across multiple meetings and started after the latest Teams desktop update. Other colleagues on the same network are not affected.

title: SharePoint site returning Access Denied for entire team
description: The entire Marketing department is unable to access the main SharePoint collaboration site. Access Denied error shown for all 12 team members simultaneously. Site was accessible yesterday. No permissions changes were made by the team.

title: MFA authenticator app not sending push notifications
description: Microsoft Authenticator app stopped sending push notifications on iPhone 15. Sign-in attempts hang at the MFA prompt. User can still use the 6-digit code as a workaround but push approval has not worked for 2 days. App is up to date.

title: VPN drops connection every 20–30 minutes
description: VPN client disconnects intermittently every 20 to 30 minutes while working from home. Reconnecting manually restores access but disrupts ongoing work. Issue has persisted for 3 days. No issues reported when on the office network.

title: OneDrive not syncing — files stuck at 0%
description: OneDrive sync has been stuck at 0% for all files since yesterday morning. The sync icon shows processing but no files complete. Pausing and resuming sync does not help. Approximately 2GB of work files are pending upload.

title: Office printer on floor 3 showing offline
description: The HP LaserJet on floor 3 near the kitchen is showing as offline on all workstations. Print jobs queue but do not print. The printer display panel is blank. Issue started this morning. The floor 1 printer is working as an alternative.

title: Outlook calendar not displaying team meetings
description: Shared team calendar meetings are not appearing in Outlook desktop calendar view. Meetings are visible in Outlook on the web and on mobile but missing from the desktop client. Affects the last 2 weeks of entries. Personal calendar entries are unaffected.

title: Laptop running extremely slow after Windows update
description: Laptop performance has severely degraded following the Windows 11 update applied automatically overnight. Boot time increased from 30 seconds to over 4 minutes. Applications take up to 2 minutes to open. CPU usage shows 100% constantly in Task Manager.

title: New starter cannot access any SharePoint sites
description: New employee Mark Duffy who joined today has no access to any SharePoint sites. Provisioning email was sent but permissions do not appear to have applied. User can log into Microsoft 365 and access Teams but all SharePoint attempts return Access Denied.

title: VPN cannot connect — authentication error 701
description: VPN client returns error 701 (authentication failed) on every connection attempt. Issue started after an Azure AD password policy change was pushed last week. User has reset password twice but the error persists. Working from home and completely unable to access internal systems.

title: Teams meetings not appearing in calendar after room booking
description: When a meeting room is booked via Outlook, the corresponding Teams meeting link is not being generated and the meeting does not appear in the Teams calendar. Affects all room bookings made in the last 4 days. Direct Teams meetings without room bookings work correctly.

title: Outlook emails not syncing on iPhone
description: Outlook mobile app on iPhone 14 Pro stopped syncing new emails 2 days ago. The app shows a sync error in the account settings. Removing and re-adding the account did not resolve the issue. Other Microsoft 365 apps on the same phone are working normally.

title: Password reset link expired before user could use it
description: User received a self-service password reset email but the link expired within minutes rather than the expected 24-hour window. Three attempts were made with the same result. User was locked out of all Microsoft 365 services for half a day.
resolution: Password reset link expiry was incorrectly configured to 10 minutes in the SSPR policy. Updated the Azure AD SSPR token lifetime to 24 hours. Manually reset user password and confirmed sign-in successful.

title: Teams camera not detected on new laptop
description: Built-in webcam not detected by Teams on newly issued Dell laptop. Camera works in the Windows Camera app and in Zoom. Teams shows no camera available in device settings. Driver appears installed correctly in Device Manager.
resolution: Teams privacy settings were blocking camera access. Enabled camera permission for Teams in Windows 11 Privacy settings. Camera now detected and working in all calls.

title: Shared mailbox not appearing in Outlook profile
description: Finance shared mailbox stopped appearing in Outlook left panel this morning. User has delegate access confirmed in admin portal but the mailbox does not auto-mount. Manually adding the account results in an error.

title: Wi-Fi dropping intermittently on floor 2
description: Multiple staff on floor 2 reporting Wi-Fi disconnections throughout the day. Affects approximately 15 users. Wired connections on the same floor are unaffected. Issue appears to be isolated to the east wing access point near meeting room C.

title: Power BI report failing to refresh — gateway error
description: The weekly sales dashboard in Power BI is failing to refresh with a gateway connection error. Scheduled refresh was working until 3 days ago. The on-premises data gateway shows as online in the admin portal. Other reports using the same gateway refresh correctly.

title: Azure AD account locked after failed login attempts
description: Account locked out after multiple failed login attempts from an unrecognised IP address in Eastern Europe. User confirmed they did not initiate the logins. Potential brute force attempt. Account needs unlocking and security review.
resolution: Account unlocked and sign-in logs reviewed. Suspicious logins blocked via Conditional Access policy. MFA enforcement confirmed active. User advised to review account activity and change password.

title: Intune not pushing software update to device
description: Mandatory security patch assigned via Intune has not deployed to the device after 3 days. Device shows as compliant in Intune portal but patch status remains pending. Manual Windows Update finds the patch but installing it outside of Intune is not permitted by policy.

title: Unable to join Teams channel — missing permissions
description: User cannot join the Project Alpha private channel in Teams. Channel shows in search but Join button is greyed out. Team owner has confirmed the user should have access. Issue persists after team owner re-sent the invite.
resolution: User was added directly to the private channel membership list by team owner via admin portal. Standard invite flow had a known bug in this tenant version. Channel now accessible.

title: Excel crashing when opening large files
description: Excel crashes immediately when attempting to open files larger than 50MB. Smaller files open without issue. Crashes occur on both desktop and laptop. No crash report dialog appears. Issue started after the last Microsoft 365 update 8 days ago.
resolution: Repaired Microsoft 365 installation via Settings. Corrupt update cache identified as root cause. Excel stable after repair and tested with 120MB file successfully.

title: Outlook sending emails to Junk for internal recipients
description: Emails sent from this user's account are landing in the Junk folder of internal recipients. External emails are delivered normally. Issue affects all recipients on the same domain. Sender's account is not flagged in Exchange admin. Started 3 days ago.

title: Laptop battery draining in under 2 hours
description: Laptop battery life has dropped from a full day to under 2 hours over the past week. Battery health in Windows settings shows 41% capacity. Device is only 8 months old. Battery drain occurs even when the laptop is in sleep mode.

title: SharePoint document library not loading — blank page
description: A specific SharePoint document library is rendering as a blank white page for all team members. The rest of the SharePoint site loads correctly. The library contains approximately 4,000 documents. Issue appeared after a large batch upload was performed.
resolution: Library exceeded the SharePoint list view threshold of 5,000 items due to the bulk upload. Created indexed columns and applied filtered views to bring item count within threshold. Library loading correctly for all users.

title: VPN client not installing on Windows 11 device
description: VPN client installer fails at 67% with error code 0x80070005 on a new Windows 11 laptop. Local admin rights were granted for the installation attempt. Two reinstall attempts made. Other standard software installs without issue.
resolution: Error 0x80070005 caused by a Windows Defender policy blocking the VPN driver installation. Added VPN installer to Defender exclusions via Intune policy. Installation completed successfully on third attempt.

title: Entire office lost internet access for 45 minutes
description: Complete internet outage affecting all 85 staff in the Dublin office. Both wired and wireless connections affected. VoIP phones also down. Outage lasted 45 minutes from 09:15 to 10:00. ISP confirmed no issues on their end during the outage window.
resolution: Core router firmware update applied automatically overnight caused a routing table corruption. Router rolled back to previous firmware version and configuration restored from backup. Monitoring added for future firmware updates.

title: New user account not provisioned after onboarding
description: HR submitted the new starter form 3 days before the start date but the Microsoft 365 account was not created by the start date. New employee unable to access any systems on day one. Provisioning automation did not trigger.
resolution: HR onboarding form submission failed silently due to a Power Automate flow error. Account manually provisioned. Root cause in automation flow fixed and tested. New monitoring alert added to catch future failures.

title: Teams background blur option missing after update
description: Background blur and custom background options have disappeared from the Teams video call settings after the latest app update. Option was available last week. GPU drivers are up to date. Issue affects 3 users on similar laptop models.
resolution: Teams update 1.6.00.33763 removed GPU-accelerated background effects on devices with older integrated graphics. Applied Teams background effects registry workaround. Feature restored for all 3 affected users.

title: Printer on floor 1 producing faded output
description: HP printer on floor 1 is producing significantly faded print output across all colour and black and white jobs. Toner levels show above 80% in the printer management console. Cleaning cycles run twice with no improvement.
resolution: Fuser unit identified as faulty. Replacement fuser unit fitted by on-site engineer. Print quality confirmed normal across 20 test pages. Toner cartridge also replaced as a precaution.

title: OneDrive storage quota exceeded — unable to save files
description: User's OneDrive storage is at 100% capacity and new files cannot be saved or synced. Review of storage shows large video files from a previous project are consuming most of the 1TB allocation. User needs either a quota increase or assistance archiving old files.
resolution: Archived 180GB of old project video files to SharePoint document library. OneDrive quota now at 42%. Educated user on storage best practices and SharePoint vs OneDrive usage guidelines.

title: Outlook rule not working — emails not moving to folder
description: An Outlook inbox rule that was working for over a year has stopped moving emails from a specific sender to the designated folder. Emails continue to arrive in the inbox. Rule is enabled and conditions appear correct. Disabling and re-enabling the rule has no effect.
resolution: Outlook rules quota was exceeded causing newer rules to silently fail. Deleted 12 obsolete rules to bring total below the 256KB limit. Recreated the affected rule which is now functioning correctly.

title: Cannot access Power Platform admin centre
description: Power Platform admin centre returns an authorisation error when accessed. User has Power Platform admin role assigned in Azure AD confirmed by IT. Access was working last week. Microsoft 365 admin centre accessible without issue.
resolution: Power Platform environment admin role required separate assignment in the Power Platform admin centre in addition to the Azure AD role. Role assigned correctly. Admin centre access restored.

title: Laptop screen flickering intermittently
description: Laptop display flickers approximately every 10 to 15 minutes. Flicker lasts 2 to 3 seconds and then stabilises. Occurs both on battery and when plugged in. External monitor connected via USB-C dock does not flicker. Display driver recently updated.

title: Teams Live Events not accessible to external attendees
description: External guests invited to a company Teams Live Event are unable to join. They receive a generic error page when clicking the event link. Internal attendees can join without issue. Event is scheduled for an important client presentation in 2 days.
resolution: Live Event was created with the wrong producer permission level blocking anonymous attendees. Event recreated with correct public access settings. External attendee link tested and confirmed working from 3 external email addresses.

title: SharePoint search returning no results
description: SharePoint search returns zero results for all queries on the intranet site. Searching for document titles that are known to exist returns nothing. Search was working last week. Site collection search settings appear normal in the admin panel.
resolution: SharePoint search index became corrupted after a large content migration. Triggered full re-crawl from the Search Service Application. Search results restored after 4-hour indexing period.

title: Keyboard and mouse unresponsive after sleep mode
description: Laptop keyboard and trackpad become completely unresponsive after the device wakes from sleep mode. Only a full restart restores input. Issue occurs consistently every time the lid is closed and reopened. USB external keyboard also unresponsive after wake.
resolution: Disabled USB selective suspend in Windows power management settings. Updated Intel Management Engine Interface driver. Sleep/wake cycle tested 10 times without recurrence.

title: Cannot download attachments from Outlook on the web
description: Clicking email attachments in Outlook on the web produces no response. No download dialog appears and no error message is shown. Affects all file types including PDFs and Word documents. Downloads work in the Outlook desktop client and on mobile.
resolution: Browser extension was blocking the download prompt in Chrome. Issue reproduced and confirmed. User switched to Edge as primary browser for Outlook on the web. Long term fix: added Outlook web app to Chrome extension whitelist.

title: MFA setup failing for new device — QR code not scanning
description: User is trying to register a new phone with Microsoft Authenticator but the QR code during MFA setup is not scanning. Tried on iPhone camera, Authenticator built-in scanner, and Google Lens. QR code appears visually correct on screen. Setup code entry also failing.
resolution: MFA registration page was loading a cached version with a corrupted QR code. Cleared browser cache and opened registration link in InPrivate mode. QR code scanned successfully and new device registered.

title: Azure DevOps pipeline failing — agent offline
description: CI/CD pipeline failing because the self-hosted build agent shows as offline in Azure DevOps. The agent machine is running and network connectivity confirmed. Agent service appears to be running in Windows Services but not connecting to Azure DevOps.
resolution: Azure DevOps agent PAT token had expired. Regenerated PAT with 1-year expiry and reconfigured agent. Agent came online immediately. Added PAT expiry monitoring to the team runbook.

title: Outlook search not finding emails from last month
description: Outlook desktop search returns no results for emails older than 30 days despite the mailbox containing emails from several years. Webmail search works correctly. Issue appeared after mailbox was migrated to a new Exchange Online region.
resolution: Outlook search index on the local machine was not rebuilt after mailbox migration. Rebuilt Outlook search index via Control Panel. Full search history restored after 2-hour indexing period.

title: Teams status stuck on Away — not updating automatically
description: Teams presence status is stuck on Away and does not automatically change to Available when the user is active. Manually setting status to Available works temporarily but reverts to Away after a few minutes. Issue affects meeting availability and incoming call routing.
resolution: Teams presence was being overridden by an Outlook calendar entry marked as Away from a recurring meeting series that had ended. Deleted the orphaned calendar series. Presence now updating correctly.

title: SharePoint list view threshold exceeded — page not loading
description: A SharePoint list used for project tracking is returning a threshold error and not loading. The list has grown to over 6,000 items. Team relies on this list daily for project status updates. No indexed columns are currently configured.
resolution: Added indexed columns on Status and Created date fields. Created filtered views limiting each view to under 5,000 items. List loading correctly. Team trained on view management to prevent recurrence.

title: Wi-Fi access point down in meeting room B
description: Meeting room B on the second floor has no Wi-Fi connectivity. The access point ceiling unit has no LED indicator lights showing. Clients frequently use this room for external presentations and reliable Wi-Fi is essential.
resolution: PoE switch port powering the access point had failed. Moved access point to a working PoE port on the same switch. Access point came online and Wi-Fi confirmed operational in meeting room B.

title: Power BI dashboard not loading for specific user group
description: The executive KPI dashboard in Power BI is returning a permission error for all members of the Leadership group. Other Power BI reports are accessible. The dashboard was shared correctly according to the Power BI admin. Issue started after a workspace migration.

title: Intune device compliance policy blocking email access
description: Conditional Access policy enforced via Intune is blocking Outlook email access on a company device that shows as non-compliant. Device has all required updates installed but compliance status has not refreshed. User unable to access email for 2 days.
resolution: Intune compliance evaluation was cached with an outdated non-compliant status. Triggered a manual sync from the Intune portal. Device evaluated as compliant immediately. Email access restored. Compliance sync interval reduced from 8 hours to 1 hour.

title: User unable to reset own password via self-service portal
description: Self-service password reset is failing at the verification step despite the user having registered authentication methods. The portal accepts the verification code but then shows a generic failure error. Affected user cannot access any Microsoft 365 services.
resolution: SSPR was failing due to a write-back sync issue between Azure AD and on-premises Active Directory. Restarted Azure AD Connect sync service on the domain controller. Password reset tested successfully after sync completed.

title: Microsoft 365 licence not assigned after role change
description: Employee moved from contractor to full-time role 5 days ago. HR updated the role in the HR system but the Microsoft 365 Business Premium licence was not assigned automatically. User still on the contractor licence which expires at the end of the month.
resolution: Licence assignment automation was tied to a group membership that HR had not updated. Added user to the correct security group. Licence assigned automatically within 30 minutes. Contractor licence removed.

title: Laptop overheating and shutting down under load
description: Laptop performs an emergency thermal shutdown when running video calls or compiling code. Surface temperature exceeds safe levels within 20 minutes of sustained load. Cooling vents are clear. Internal fans audibly running at high speed before shutdown.
resolution: Thermal paste on CPU had dried out causing poor heat transfer. Device sent to manufacturer repair centre. New thermal paste applied and cooling system serviced. Replacement loaner device provided for the 5-day repair period.

title: SharePoint permissions not applying to sub-folders
description: Unique permissions set on a SharePoint document library sub-folder are not being respected. Users who should be excluded from a sub-folder can still access it. Permission inheritance was broken and unique permissions applied but access behaviour has not changed.
resolution: SharePoint permission cache had not cleared after inheritance was broken. Ran PowerShell script to force permission propagation on the sub-folder tree. Access controls verified correct for all user groups.

title: Outlook out-of-office reply not triggering for external senders
description: Automatic out-of-office replies are being sent to internal senders but not to external email addresses. Out-of-office is configured to reply to all senders. Exchange transport rules appear normal. Issue affects the user's ability to communicate leave status to clients.
resolution: Exchange Online anti-spam policy was suppressing external auto-replies as a security measure. Updated the policy to allow out-of-office responses to verified external domains. Tested with 3 external addresses and confirmed working.

title: Teams channel tabs missing after SharePoint migration
description: Following a SharePoint site migration to a new URL, all custom tabs in multiple Teams channels are showing errors. 8 channels across 3 teams are affected. The tabs were linked to SharePoint document libraries that moved during the migration.
resolution: Removed broken tabs from all affected channels and re-added them pointing to the new SharePoint URLs. Documented migration process to include Teams tab URL updates as a mandatory step for future SharePoint migrations.

title: VPN split tunnelling not routing traffic correctly
description: After enabling split tunnelling on the VPN profile, internal application traffic is being routed through the internet rather than the VPN tunnel. Corporate banking portal and internal HR system affected. General internet browsing routes correctly.
resolution: Split tunnel include routes were missing the IP ranges for the banking portal and HR system following a network subnet change. Updated split tunnel route table in VPN profile and pushed update via Intune. Routing confirmed correct.

title: Azure AD Conditional Access blocking legacy app login
description: A business-critical legacy application used by the Finance team is being blocked by the new Conditional Access policy requiring MFA. The application does not support modern authentication and cannot prompt for MFA. 18 Finance team members affected.
resolution: Created a named location exclusion for the office IP range and added the legacy app service account to an MFA exclusion group as a temporary measure. Long-term plan to migrate the app to modern authentication within 90 days agreed with vendor.

title: OneDrive known folder move failing silently
description: Intune policy to redirect Desktop and Documents to OneDrive via Known Folder Move is not applying to 6 devices in the Engineering team. Other devices in the same Intune group have the policy applied correctly. Affected devices show the policy as applied in Intune.
resolution: Affected devices had a legacy Group Policy Object conflicting with the Intune KFM policy. Removed conflicting GPO from the OU. Known Folder Move applied successfully on next policy refresh cycle.

title: USB docking station not recognised after Windows update
description: Dell USB-C docking station stopped being recognised by the laptop after the latest Windows 11 cumulative update. External monitors, keyboard and ethernet connected through the dock are all non-functional. Dock works on a colleague's laptop running the previous Windows version.

title: Meeting room display not showing Teams calendar
description: The Surface Hub in the main boardroom is not displaying the room calendar or upcoming meetings. The Teams Rooms app is running but shows an empty schedule despite the room having bookings. Issue started after a firmware update was applied remotely.
resolution: Teams Rooms app authentication token expired after firmware update and did not auto-renew. Re-authenticated the room account on the Surface Hub. Calendar displaying correctly with all upcoming bookings.

title: Power Automate flow failing — connection expired
description: A Power Automate flow that sends weekly project status reports has stopped running. Flow history shows connection expired errors for the SharePoint and Outlook connectors. Flow was running successfully for 8 months without issue.
resolution: OAuth tokens for SharePoint and Outlook connections had expired after 90 days per the new tenant token policy. Re-authenticated both connections under the flow owner account. Flow tested and running. Created a calendar reminder to re-authenticate quarterly.

title: Outlook delegate access removed unexpectedly
description: PA lost delegate access to the Director's Outlook mailbox and calendar overnight. No changes were made by the IT team. PA uses this access daily to manage the Director's schedule. Calendar entries remain visible but send-on-behalf is no longer working.
resolution: Azure AD Connect sync had overwritten the mailbox delegate settings during a bulk attribute sync. Re-applied delegate permissions from backup configuration. Send-on-behalf confirmed working. Sync exclusion rule added for delegate attributes.

title: Network drive mapping failing on laptop restart
description: Mapped network drives disconnect and do not reconnect automatically on laptop restart. The reconnect at logon option is set but drives show as disconnected after every boot. Users must manually remap drives each morning. Affects 7 users in the Finance team.
resolution: Network drive mapping was happening before VPN authentication completed at startup. Deployed a logon script with a 30-second delay to allow VPN to establish before drive mapping runs. Drives reconnecting correctly on all 7 devices.

title: Azure DevOps repo access revoked after team restructure
description: Three developers lost access to the main product repository in Azure DevOps following the team restructure last month. They were moved to a new security group but the group was not added to the project permissions. CI/CD contributions blocked.
resolution: Added the new security group to the Azure DevOps project with Contributor permission level. Verified all 3 developers can clone, push and create pull requests. Documented the group permission update as a required step in the team restructure runbook.

title: Teams notifications not appearing on mobile
description: Teams mobile app on Android is not showing push notifications for new messages or mentions. In-app notifications work when the app is open. Issue affects both channel messages and direct messages. Notification settings appear correct in both the app and Android settings.
resolution: Android battery optimisation was putting the Teams app into deep sleep and preventing background notifications. Excluded Teams from battery optimisation in Android settings. Push notifications confirmed working for all message types.

title: SharePoint workflow not triggering on item creation
description: A SharePoint Designer workflow configured to run on item creation is not triggering for new list items. The workflow runs correctly when triggered manually. Workflow history shows no automatic execution entries for the past 3 weeks.
resolution: SharePoint workflow service account password had expired causing the workflow timer job to fail silently. Reset workflow service account password and restarted the SharePoint Workflow Manager service. Automatic triggers verified working.

title: Laptop touchpad stopped working after driver update
description: Laptop touchpad is completely non-responsive following an automatic driver update pushed overnight via Intune. External USB mouse works. Touchpad device is visible in Device Manager with a warning icon. Rollback of the driver not available through Device Manager.
resolution: Downloaded previous touchpad driver version from manufacturer website and installed manually. Touchpad restored. Intune driver update policy updated to exclude this touchpad driver version for this laptop model.

title: MFA prompt looping — cannot complete sign-in
description: User is caught in an MFA loop during sign-in. After entering credentials the MFA prompt appears, the code is entered correctly, but the page refreshes and prompts for MFA again endlessly. No error message displayed. Affects all Microsoft 365 services including web and desktop apps.
resolution: Browser cookie blocking was preventing the Azure AD session token from being set after MFA completion causing the loop. Cleared all browser cookies and cache. Issue also reproduced in corporate Chrome profile due to a cookie policy. Excluded login.microsoftonline.com from the cookie blocking policy.

title: Outlook contacts not syncing with Teams directory
description: Personal Outlook contacts are not appearing in the Teams people search or call directory. New contacts added to Outlook do not propagate to Teams. The issue has been present for approximately 2 months and is causing missed connections on Teams calls.
resolution: Exchange and Teams contact sync was disabled for this user account in a misconfigured tenant policy. Re-enabled unified contact store for the account. Contacts synced within 24 hours.

title: Power BI embedded report blank in SharePoint web part
description: A Power BI report embedded in a SharePoint page via the Power BI web part is showing as a blank white panel. The report opens correctly when accessed directly in Power BI. SharePoint page loads without errors. Issue affects all visitors to the intranet page.
resolution: Power BI report workspace had moved from shared to premium capacity causing the embed token to fail. Re-embedded the report using the new workspace URL and updated the SharePoint web part configuration. Report displaying correctly.

title: OneDrive files appearing as read-only after sync
description: All files in a specific OneDrive folder are appearing as read-only after syncing to the local machine. Files can be edited directly on OneDrive web. The folder is not shared or set as read-only. Issue appeared after OneDrive client updated automatically.
resolution: OneDrive Files On-Demand feature was marking synced files with a read-only attribute due to a client bug in version 23.184. Updated OneDrive client to version 23.196 which included the fix. Files restored to read-write on next sync.

title: Exchange email routing loop causing NDR bounces
description: Multiple users receiving non-delivery reports for emails they did not send. Exchange message tracking logs show a routing loop between two mail flow connectors. Approximately 400 bounce emails generated in 2 hours. External recipients also reporting bounced emails.
resolution: A misconfigured inbound connector was creating a mail routing loop with the existing Exchange Online Protection connector. Removed the duplicate connector and updated SPF record. Mail flow confirmed normal. Root cause traced to a manual connector added during a third-party email security trial.

title: New laptop not enrolled in Intune after imaging
description: Three new Dell laptops imaged using the standard process are not appearing in the Intune device list after 5 days. Autopilot is configured but devices are not joining Azure AD during OOBE. Manual Azure AD join works but Intune policies then do not apply.

title: Azure AD group membership not reflecting in Teams
description: An Azure AD security group was updated to add 5 new members but they are not appearing as members of the corresponding Teams team. Group membership is correct in Azure AD portal. Delay has persisted for over 24 hours which exceeds the normal sync window.
resolution: Azure AD to Teams group sync had stalled due to a throttling event during a large tenant-wide sync. Manually triggered group membership refresh via Microsoft Graph API. All 5 members appeared in Teams within 10 minutes.

title: Shared drive quota warning — team at 98% capacity
description: The Engineering team shared network drive is at 98% capacity. New file saves are intermittently failing. The drive contains project archives going back 7 years. A capacity increase or archival solution is urgently needed to prevent service disruption.

title: Teams meeting recording not saving to SharePoint
description: Meeting recordings are not saving to the team SharePoint after the Microsoft policy change that redirected recordings from OneDrive to SharePoint. Recordings appear to complete but are not found in SharePoint. Users receive no error notification.

title: Outlook signature not applying on replies
description: Email signature configured in Outlook settings is applying correctly on new emails but is not appearing on replies or forwarded messages. Signature settings show it is enabled for both new messages and replies. Issue affects desktop Outlook only.

title: VPN connected but cannot reach internal systems
description: VPN client shows as connected with a valid IP address assigned but all internal systems are unreachable. Ping to internal servers times out. DNS resolution for internal hostnames fails. Internet access through the VPN is working. Issue started 20 minutes ago.
